connections.gloss: afflicted(-tion), anguish, burdened, persecution, tribulation, trouble
connections.def: from 2346; pressure (literally or figuratively):--afflicted(-tion), anguish, burdened, persecution, tribulation, trouble. see GREEK for
from a presumed derivative of 3806; something undergone, i.e. hardship or pain; subjectively, an emotion or influence:-- affection, affliction, motion, suffering. see GREEK for
